meta.title: deeplearning.ai's Heroes of Deep Learning: Yann LeCun
meta.description:
This interview is published from deeplearning.ai’s Deep Learning Specialization (https://www.coursera.org/specializations/deep-learning) on Coursera.

It is part of the course on “Convolutional Neural Networks” (https://www.coursera.org/learn/convolutional-neural-networks).
